summary: encode-batch sub-skill added (shared, Haiku, subagent_safe). Producer skills (snapshot-brand, ingest-resource) delegate their N-mutation encoding to a Haiku sub-agent so the main thread stays responsive while the batch runs in background. Mechanical mapping observation → field_path; semantic interpretation stays upstream in the producer. snapshot-brand Step 3 + Step 6 patched. ingest-resource Step 3B patched (inline still acceptable for ≤5 mutations). Performance target: 25-mutation snapshot ships synthesis in 5-15s instead of 60-120s sequential.
